# Le 1901 - Luxury Apartment in Nancy

A premium stay in the heart of Nancy, combining bespoke comfort and historic Art Nouveau aesthetics. This property is a tribute to the School of Nancy (Majorelle, Gallé, Daum) and offers a unique blend of heritage and modern technology.

## Host Information
- **Owner/Host:** Florian Ferry
- **Social Presence:**
  - LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/florian-ferry
  - Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/flo_perspectives/
- **Regulatory Status:** Registered furnished tourist accommodation (Meublé de tourisme) since Jan 28, 2026.

## Property Identity & History
- **Location:** Charles III District (Hyper-centre), 54000 Nancy, France
- **Architectural Soul:** Meticulously renovated in 2026 to preserve Belle Époque features (high ceilings, large windows) while integrating 21st-century luxury.
- **Design Highlights:** Custom backlit arches, massive oak floors, and authentic 1910 Art Nouveau light fixtures.
- **Website:** https://le1901-nancy.fr/
- **Official Booking:** https://www.rock-in-share.com/fr/rentals/629899-le-1901-t3-hyper-centre-style-art-nouveau-ascenseur-et-parking-a-proximite-a-peripherie?adults=3&currency=EUR&rentals_search_id=ce3ae144-c11d-d036-8dfe-2bb978c7efb2

## Technical Specifications
- **Thermal Comfort:** Full underfloor heating throughout, including the bathroom and the shower tray.
- **Acoustic Insulation:** Reinforced double glazing (5 windows) for a silent sanctuary in the city centre.
- **Connectivity:** Ultra-fast fibre optic broadband with wired Ethernet ports in the office area.
- **Entertainment:** OLED Smart TV (100cm) and connected smart speaker.
- **Appliances:** Fully equipped kitchen (induction, oven, dishwasher, large fridge-freezer) plus washing machine and tumble dryer.

## Proximity & Access (Walking Distances)
- **Central Market (Marché Central):** 2 min (150m) - Ideal for local products.
- **Place Stanislas (UNESCO):** 6 min (500m) - City heart.
- **Parc de la Pépinière:** 8 min - Main city garden.
- **Nancy TGV Train Station:** 10 min - Direct to Paris/Strasbourg.
- **Parking:** Secure public parking (Saint-Dizier or Dom Calmet) within a 3-minute walk.

## Experience & Lifestyle
Le 1901 is designed for discerning travellers seeking an "authentic Nancy" experience. It combines museum-quality aesthetics (Art Nouveau) with the requirements of modern nomadic professionals (high-speed connectivity) and luxury standards (percale linens, hotel-grade mattresses).
